MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mee Chan is present.
Attorney Jerod Hendrickson appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Johnny Wood is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Bigger representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JAN-09-2012 is vacated.
